basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Deoghar Pharmacovigilance Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar (AIIMS Deoghar)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar (AIIMS Deoghar) Pharmacovigilance Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 7 May 2026 on the official website https://www.aiimsdeoghar.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Deoghar Pharmacovigilance Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master degree in Pharmacology/Clinical Pharmacology/ Pharmacy Practice/Clinical Research. OR Pharm. D/MBBS/BDS
qualification.details: Pharmacovigilance Assistant (PA): Master degree in Pharmacology/Clinical Pharmacology/ Pharmacy Practice/Clinical Research. OR Pharm. D/MBBS/BDS from a recognised university/Institute. Desirable Qualification: One year experience in drug safety/Pharmacovigilance.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per NCC, PvPI – IPC Ghaziabad norms
salary_details.details: As per NCC, PvPI – IPC Ghaziabad norms. The salary will be furnished by Indian Pharmacopoeia Commission, Ghaziabad, UP.

selection_process: Screening examination (if more than 10 eligible candidates apply) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Deoghar Pharmacovigilance Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Deoghar Pharmacovigilance Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Pharmacovigilance Assistant role?
faq.answer: A Master's degree in Pharmacology, Clinical Pharmacology, Pharmacy Practice, Clinical Research, or a Pharm. D/MBBS/BDS from a recognized university is required. One year of experience in drug safety/pharmacovigilance is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Pharmacovigilance Assistant position is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Pharmacovigilance Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a screening examination if more than 10 eligible candidates apply, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Pharmacovigilance Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary will be as per NCC, PvPI – IPC Ghaziabad norms. The exact salary details will be furnished by the Indian Pharmacopoeia Commission, Ghaziabad, UP.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification released by AIIMS Deoghar for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Pharmacovigilance Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Pharmacovigilance Assistant post in AIIMS Deoghar.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via Email for the Pharmacovigilance Assistant position.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Deoghar located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Deoghar is located in Deoghar, Jharkhand, with the pincode 814152.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is AIIMS/DEO/PHARMA/RECT./PHARMACOVIGILANCE ASSISTANT/04.
